name: Gravekeeper's Watcher
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>墓</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>守</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もり</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>監</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>視</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>者</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: During either player's turn, when your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or monster effect that could make them discard when it resolves: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.
mnst_eff: During either player's turn, when your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or monster effect that could make them discard when it resolves: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.
eff: During either player's turn, when your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or monster effect that could make them discard when it resolves: You can send this card from your hand to the Graveyard; negate the activation, and if you do, destroy it.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 3: Yugi's World Mega Pack

action: Sends itself from hand to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
